mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id AS eventId, exchange_name AS exchangeName, routing_key AS routingKey, payload_type AS payloadType, payload_json AS payloadJson, headers_json AS headersJson, status, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_at AS nextRetryAt, last_error AS lastError, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM reliable_mq_outbox WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY_PENDING') AND next_retry_at <= #{now} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE reliable_mq_outbox SET retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
